summary: A brief product recommendation for Bose QuietComfort noise-canceling headphones. The author endorses these headphones for anyone who travels frequently or works in shared office spaces with multiple people. While acknowledging the high price, he argues the active noise cancellation technology makes them worth the investment for blocking out ambient sounds like trains, flights, and conversations.
key_points: Active noise-canceling headphones are essential for frequent travelers and open office workers
Bose QuietComfort series effectively blocks monotonous ambient sounds
The high price is justified by the quality and functionality
money_quotes: They are not cheap, but they are best!
If you are traveling a lot or working in a shared room with more than 5 people, you have to buy them, you won't regret it!!
key_insight: Quality noise-canceling headphones are a worthwhile investment for knowledge workers dealing with distracting environments.
